S.FORM: == satangahan : == masay masay u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :śĒÄÁ∂†ś§ćÁČ© nu Amilika :vine nu Zipun :„Ā§„āčś§ćÁČ©„ÉĽŤĒďś§ćÁČ© u canan ku masay(masayśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź sapihica ku masay(masayŚĀöšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == masaj masaj u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :**** nu amir~…ĺika :*in…ô nu zipun :******** u ¶anan ku masaj(masaj***?)* sapińßi ¶a ku masaj(masaj***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == masay masay u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :śĒÄÁ∂†ś§ćÁČ© nu Amilika :vine nu Zipun :„Ā§„āčś§ćÁČ©„ÉĽŤĒďś§ćÁČ© u canan ku masay(masayśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź sapihica ku masay(masayŚĀöšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == masaj masaj u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :**** nu amir~…ĺika :*in…ô nu zipun :******** u ¶anan ku masaj(masaj***?)* sapińßi ¶a ku masaj(masaj***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
